scene.message: Yukino: {ctl0f:1}!{nl} Hold up the mirror!!{waitkey}{ret}
Ayase: N-{wait_fr:30}no way...{waitkey}{ret}
Elly: Why...?{waitkey}{nl} What's happening?{waitkey}{ret}
Brown: ...{wait_fr:30}...{wait_fr:30}...{wait_fr:30}...?{waitkey}{nl} What? It just glowed?{waitkey}{ret}
Yukino: No way...{waitkey}{nl} O-once more!!{waitkey}{ret}
Nanjo: What did you say?!{waitkey}{ret}
Brown: Damn it!{waitkey}{ret}
Snow Queen: Gu... ah......{waitkey}{ret}
Yukino: Did we get her!?{waitkey}{ret}
Snow Queen: Gyaaaaaah!{waitkey}{nl} My face!{wait_fr:30} It's buuurning!!{waitkey}{ret}
Ayase: Kyaaaaaa!!{waitkey}{ret}
Brown: Dehyaaaah!?{waitkey}{nl} I-i-i-i-i-i-{wait_fr:15}it came out!!{waitkey}{ret}
Elly: Oh my...{waitkey}{ret}
